title: Black Hole Sun
why_this_song: Black Hole Sun by Soundgarden (1994) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 31 times; first heard in: "Neath the black, the sky looks dead"
Appears 30 times; first heard in: "Black hole sun"
Appears 26 times; first heard in: "Won't you come"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "And wash away the rain?"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "And wash away the rain?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "black" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "black" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hole" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Steal the warm wind, tired friend

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Black Hole Sun" was released in 1994. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Black Hole Sun" foi lançada em 1994. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Black Hole Sun" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Black Hole Sun" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
